description_long: This object is a small flag attached to a slender, pointed pole. The flag features six horizontal stripes in the colors red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple, reminiscent of the Pride flag. The flag is rectangular and appears to be made of a lightweight fabric, while the pole is thin and likely metallic or plastic, with a sharp tip at the bottom for easy insertion into soft ground. The flag is proportionally much smaller than the pole, suggesting it is a miniature or hand-held version. The surface of the flag is smooth and the colors are vivid, with no visible text, symbols, or emblems beyond the colored stripes. The overall condition of the flag and pole appears pristine, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A small, vivid rainbow-striped flag on a slender, pointed pole, resembling a miniature Pride flag. The flag is rectangular and attached to a smooth, likely metallic or plastic stick.
description_view_0: The flag is fully visible with all six colored stripes and the pole on the left side.
description_view_1: The flag is edge-on and nearly invisible, showing only the thin profile of the pole.
description_view_2: The flag is fully visible with all six colored stripes and the pole on the right side.
description_view_3: The flag is edge-on and nearly invisible, showing only the thin profile of the pole.
attribute_flag_design: Six horizontal stripes in red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple, with no symbols, text, or emblems; the design is consistent with the Pride flag and the stripes are of equal width.
